title: ranunculus hydrocharis var. stagnatilis
intro: Ranunculus hydrocharis var. stagnatilis is a lesser-known variety of water crowfoot, a type of aquatic plant belonging to the buttercup family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus hydrocharis var. stagnatilis are said to include the reduction of inflammation and the treatment of skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
